agent_result.answer:
TEC statistics comparison for equatorial_atlantic, highlat_north, midlat_europe from 2024-03-01 to 2024-04-01:

- highlat_north: mean=20.405 TECU, median=19.946 TECU, max=30.960 TECU, std=3.932 TECU, p90=26.238 TECU.
- midlat_europe: mean=27.354 TECU, median=24.420 TECU, max=62.487 TECU, std=13.620 TECU, p90=46.517 TECU.
